mission.title: helm: feat(helm): add --app-version flag to 'helm install/upgrade'
mission.description:
Closes #3555

New pull request for https://github.com/helm/helm/pull/4961, sorry about that

**If applicable**:
- [X] this PR contains documentation
- [x] this PR contains unit tests

resolution.summary:
When 'helm install/upgrade --app-version 1.0.0' is run, this will override the chart app version

Closes #3555

Signed-off-by: Kevin Labesse <kevin@labesse.me>

Waiting for your feedback, not 100% sure is the most efficient way do to that
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
